title: jasminum sambac var. scandens
intro: Jasminum sambac var. scandens, also known as the climbing star jasmine or star jasmine vine, is a fragrant, evergreen climber native to tropical Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Jasminum sambac var. scandens include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tea and essential oil, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
